channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
item.description: Meta told Dylan Byers, of Puck News, that it had nixed the feature after backlash from its user base.

item.title: Meta turns off the Instagram feature that let users make AI deepfakes of public accounts
item.description: Following significant backlash, Meta is turning off the feature it announced this week that let users generate AI images based on content from public Instagram accounts just by tagging them. The feature, as originally set up, meant that content from any public Instagram account could be used in AI creations without the account owner's permission. […]...

item.title: Autonomous AI Russian 'Molniya' drone could be using the Nvidia Jetson Orin platform by exploiting a common COTS loophole
item.description: A Russian drone stripped of antennas may signal autonomous strike capability, with speculation pointing to commercial Nvidia hardware inside.

item.title: Microsoft Reports a Massive 25 Percent Jump in Emissions
item.description: Data centers are driving up the company’s use of electricity—and carbon pollution.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Saturday, July 11 (game #1629)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Saturday, July 11 (game #860)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Saturday, July 11 (game #1126)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: When the Nintendo Switch 2 hits AU$769.95 in September, you'll wish you'd read this article that told you to buy it now for AU$624
item.description: Rising costs are forcing Nintendo to increase the Switch 2’s price by AU$70 very soon, and this 11% Prime Day discount seems like a bargain by comparison.

item.title: Don't miss these 140+ best Prime Day deals in Australia on day 5, handpicked by tech experts — up to 76% off headphones, vacuums, air fryers and more
item.description: Amazon Prime Day 2026 has, so far, been very impressive, with plenty of all-time low prices on Kindles, AirPods, air fryers, smartwatches, robot vacuums and more.

item.title: The FCC is cracking down on DJI tech that dodged the foreign drone ban
item.description: Last year, we told you about Xtra, the company that lets DJI sneak its popular cameras into the US, and Skyrover, a brand seemingly selling DJI drones in disguise. They're just two of the many firms DJI is suspected of starting to skirt the United States' foreign drone ban. But it appears the FCC is […]
